failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id AS profile_id
    FROM profile
    WHERE username = 'eusougabriela'
)
SELECT 
    p.profile_id,
    c.annotation,
    c.num_likes
FROM comment c
JOIN publication pub ON c.publication_id = pub.id
JOIN target_profile p ON pub.profile_id = p.profile_id
WHERE c.annotation ILIKE '%fitness%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%treino%' 
   OR c.annotation ILIKE '%saúde%'
ORDER BY c.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id,
    pub.description AS fitness_tip,
    pub.num_likes
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
WHERE p.username = 'eusougabriela'
  AND (pub.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('portuguese', 'fitness | treino | saúde'))
ORDER BY ts_rank(pub.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('portuguese', 'fitness | treino | saúde')) DESC, pub.num_likes DESC
LIMIT 10;
